title: COSECSA Fellowship
summary: Fully funded surgical training fellowship for practitioners in East, Central, and Southern Africa. Covers tuition, accommodation, and a monthly stipend.

title: WHA 2026 Travel Scholarship
summary: Travel funding to attend the World Health Assembly 2026 for health advocates from LMICs. Covers flights, hotel, and per diem.

title: Hamlin Fistula Ethiopia Surgical Training Programme
summary: Three-month surgical training programme focused on obstetric fistula repair for OB/GYN and general surgeons from LMICs.

title: AMSURG Global Surgery Research Grant
summary: Up to $10,000 USD seed grant for original research on surgical access, outcomes, or workforce development in LMICs.

title: ISS 2026 Abstract Submission — Open Call
summary: Submit original research abstracts for the International Surgical Society 2026 Congress. Accepted presenters may apply for bursaries.

title: PAACS Surgical Residency Training Program
summary: Five-year surgical residency embedded in mission hospitals across Africa. Includes mentorship, coursework, and a research requirement.

title: AASGON Small Grants for Neuro-oncology Research
organization: African Association of Surgical Oncology & Neuroscience
summary: Small research grants ($2,000–$5,000) for African researchers investigating neuro-oncology in resource-limited settings.

title: GSF Side-Event at WHA79 — What's Next for Philanthropy
summary: A special GSF side-event at the 79th World Health Assembly exploring how philanthropic capital is evolving to support local surgical leadership. Features panel discussions, new funding announcements, and a networking reception. Virtual participation available.
tags: WHA, philanthropy, global surgery, funding, Geneva, networking
